scripts.build:wasm: bash -lc 'scripts/ensure-emsdk.sh && source ./emsdk/emsdk_env.sh && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=$EMSDK/upstream/emscripten/cmake/Modules/Platform/Emscripten.cmake ${CMAKE_ARGS} && cmake --build build --target cp_sat_runtime_site --parallel ${CMAKE_BUILD_PARALLEL_LEVEL:-2}'
scripts.build:lib: npm run build:wasm && npm run patch:wasm-runtime && npm run gen:sat-parameters && tsc && vite build --config vite.lib.config.ts && node scripts/build_browser_sources.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:site
scripts.dev: npm run build:lib && vite --config vite.site.config.ts dev --host
scripts.pack:lib: npm run build:lib && npm pack --pack-destination build/javascript/lib
scripts.test:fixture:vite:build: npm run test:fixture:vite:install && npm --prefix tests/fixtures/vite-basic run build
scripts.test:fixture:vite: npm run test:fixture:vite:build && FIXTURE_GROUP=vite playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project=vite-dev-chromium --project=vite-dev-firefox --project=vite-static-chromium --project=vite-static-firefox
scripts.test:fixture:webpack:build: npm run test:fixture:webpack:install && npm --prefix tests/fixtures/webpack-basic run build
scripts.test:fixture:webpack: npm run test:fixture:webpack:build && FIXTURE_GROUP=webpack playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project=webpack-dev-chromium --project=webpack-dev-firefox --project=webpack-static-chromium --project=webpack-static-firefox
scripts.test:fixture:rollup:build: npm run test:fixture:rollup:install && npm --prefix tests/fixtures/rollup-basic run build && cp tests/fixtures/rollup-basic/index.html tests/fixtures/rollup-basic/dist/index.html
scripts.test:fixture:rollup: npm run test:fixture:rollup:build && FIXTURE_GROUP=rollup playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.ts --project=rollup-static-chromium --project=rollup-static-firefox
scripts.test:fixture:deno: npm run test:fixture:deno:install && npm --prefix tests/fixtures/deno-basic run test
scripts.test:fixtures: npm run test:fixture:vite && npm run test:fixture:webpack && npm run test:fixture:rollup && npm run test:fixture:deno
